_source: FSTU Sarf 2023 Oct.pdf — Bāb conjugation tables: pages 31-40 (māḍī + muḍāriʿ maʿlūm for all 6 bābs). Māḍī majhūl: full table for فَتَح page 44; rule stated page 43 (same formation for all bābs; bāb كَرُم has no majhūl, page 43). Muḍāriʿ majhūl: rule page 47; base forms يُفْتَح / يُسْمَع / يُضْرَب / يُنْصَر confirmed page 47. Amr m/s forms: page 61 exercise table; full pattern pages 60-61; tashreef kabeer page 71 (complete fataha table). Nahy: tashreef sagheer page 70; full pattern page 62; tashreef kabeer page 71.
_note: Sigha IDs match sighas.json. All māḍī/muḍāriʿ forms extracted directly from textbook bāb tables (pages 31-40). All majhūl forms for bābs other than fataha are derived from the explicit rules on pages 43 and 47, which state the rule applies identically to all bābs. Amr and nahy forms for all sighas other than muxatab m/s are derived from the derivation pattern (pages 60, 62) confirmed against the tashreef kabeer (page 71). Bāb karuma has no majhūl form (textbook page 43). Final short vowels included per full tashkeel convention; PDF extraction sometimes omits final short vowels on the last letter of a form.

conjugations._note: No majhūl form. Textbook states (page 43): verbs from bāb كَرُم do not occur in the majhūl form.
Unit 2 Bāb II. Example verb: صَدَّقَ يُصَدِّقُ. Amr has no hamzat al-wasl (letter after حرف المضارع has haraka). Source: FSTU Sarf 2023 Oct.pdf page 80.
Unit 2 Bāb III. Example verb: بَارَكَ يُبَارِكُ. The ألف changes to و in the مجهول (بُوْرِكَ). Source: FSTU Sarf 2023 Oct.pdf page 82.
Unit 2 Bāb IV. Example verb: أَرْسَلَ يُرْسِلُ. Hamza drops in muḍāriʿ, returns in amr. Source: FSTU Sarf 2023 Oct.pdf page 84.
Unit 2 Bāb V. Example verb: تَقَبَّلَ يَتَقَبَّلُ. Amr formed by removing first تَ from مخاطب مضارع. Source: FSTU Sarf 2023 Oct.pdf page 86.
Unit 2 Bāb VI. Example verb: تَعَارَفَ يَتَعَارَفُ. The ألف changes to و in مجهول (تُعُورِفَ). Source: FSTU Sarf 2023 Oct.pdf page 88.
Unit 2 Bāb VII. Example verb: اِنْفَصَلَ يَنْفَصِلُ. NO مجهول form. Amr needs hamzat al-wasl because نْ has sukoon after removing حرف المضارع. Source: FSTU Sarf 2023 Oct.pdf page 90.
Unit 2 Bāb VIII. Example verb: اِجْتَنَبَ يَجْتَنِبُ. Amr and مجهول māḍī have hamzat al-wasl with ḍamma (اُجْتُنِبَ / اِجْتَنِبْ). Source: FSTU Sarf 2023 Oct.pdf page 92.
Unit 2 Bāb X. Example verb: اِسْتَغْفَرَ يَسْتَغْفِرُ. Amr needs hamzat al-wasl. مجهول māḍī: اُسْتُغْفِرَ. Source: FSTU Sarf 2023 Oct.pdf page 94.
Unit 2 Bāb فَعْلَلَة (rubāʿī mujarrad). Example verb: زَلْزَلَ يُزَلْزِلُ. No hamzat al-wasl in amr. Source: FSTU Sarf 2023 Oct.pdf page 96.
Unit 2 Bāb تَفَعْلُل (rubāʿī mazīd). Example verb: تَزَلْزَلَ يَتَزَلْزَلُ. Amr formed by removing first تَ. Source: FSTU Sarf 2023 Oct.pdf page 98.
